functions.name: DashboardTelemetryPanel
params:
{
  isConnected,
  mode,
  altitudeM,
  speedMps,
  batteryPct,
  satellites,
  hdop,
}

functions.name: DashboardTrendCharts
params:
{
  labels,
  flightHours = [],
  flightCounts = [],
  telemetryCounts = [],
  surveyHours7d,
  flights24h,
}

functions.name: PageViewsBarChart
params:
{
  title = 'Flight workload',
  totalValue = '--',
  deltaLabel,
  subtitle = 'Flight executions and imagery exports for the last 6 months',
  labels,
  series,
}

functions.name: SessionsChart
params:
{
  title = 'Survey hours',
  totalValue = '--',
  deltaLabel,
  subtitle = 'Survey hours per day for the last 30 days',
  labels,
  series,
}

functions.name: StatCard
params:
{
  title,
  value,
  interval,
  trend,
  data,
  deltaLabel,
  labels,
  tooltip,
}

callGraph.callee:
[
          system && !system.telemetry_running
            ? "Telemetry stream is offline."
            : null,
          batteryPct !== null && batteryPct < 30
            ? `Battery health low (${Math.round(batteryPct)}%).`
            : null,
          system && !isConnected ? "Live telemetry link disconnected." : null,
        ].filter

functions.name: HealthStatusCard
params:
{
  title,
  value,
  status,
  caption,
  href,
  loading,
}

functions.name: ObservabilityShortcutCard
params:
{
  title,
  description,
  buttonLabel,
  url,
  icon,
  onOpen,
  restricted,
}

functions.name: PageLayout
params:
{
  eyebrow,
  title,
  description,
  actions,
  metrics = [],
  hero,
  children,
  maxWidth = 1700,
}
